scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:windows: start "SkyHigh Server" cmd /k "cd server && npm run dev" && start "SkyHigh Client" cmd /k "cd client && npm run dev" && start "SkyHigh Admin" cmd /k "cd admin && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm i && npm i --prefix client && npm i --prefix server && npm i --prefix admin
